candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue line with same values; useful as fallback label across years.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Finance result, not revenue.
Bottom-line profitability measure, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Liability/deferred revenue-related balance, not top-line sales.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for possible label changes over time; later code should take the first available value, not sum them.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales style line; appears to aggregate production input costs.
Underlying component of raw materials usage, not preferred when aggregate direct-cost line exists.
Underlying inventory adjustment component, not preferred when aggregate direct-cost line exists.
Non-recurring acquisition cost, not COGS.
Inventory balance sheet item, not expense.

variables.notes: Selected the aggregated direct production cost row rather than summing underlying components.

candidates.why: Likely a minor component near cost-of-sales section, not a clear SG&A bucket.
Core overhead component and clearly operating expense above operating profit.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component; should be included as overhead.
Broad overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Looks like an underlying/legacy detail for one year only; less preferred than main overhead row.
Other comprehensive income item, not SG&A.

Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal is shown. Selected best overhead components above OPERATING PROFIT. Excluded depreciation/amortisation and excluded the supplemental below-EBIT R&D row from SG&A to avoid misclassification.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line exists, though shown in supplemental disclosure below operating profit; acceptable for XRD but not for SG&A inclusion.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below OPERATING PROFIT in the preview, so it was not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Net finance cost bucket includes FX and other items; use only if granular recurring components unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on borrowings; strong match.
Recurring lease interest expense; appropriate component of financing costs.
Recurring finance cost bucket; include when no indication it is one-off valuation/FX.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Looks duplicative of Right-of-use assets interests based on matching values; avoid double counting.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded Exchange Rate Losses. Did not use Financial expenses total to avoid double counting with components. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row because it appears duplicative of Right-of-use assets interests.

Equity component only, not total book equity.

Balancing row, not substantive equity measure.
Balancing row, not substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line or non-controlling interests line is shown on the balance sheet, so Total equity is the best BE proxy and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Combined total, not a standalone minority interest line.
